## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Does not diagnose
- [ ] Does not recommend treatment
- [ ] Does not claim clinical accuracy
- [ ] Preserves dentist review framing
- [ ] Does not include real PHI
- [ ] Updates packet spec or docs when needed
- [ ] Adds or updates tests
